html:
Exclusive to:

The Salt Box is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Structures Filter, Storage Solutions Filter and Cooking Filter, requiring ten Salt Crystals, a Blue Gem and a Cut Stone to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Similar to the Ice Box, the Salt Box can be used to store and preserve up to 9 stacks of Food Items. The Salt Box slows the spoilage of food by four times, which is twice the efficiency of an ice box. However, it cannot contain Crock Pot dishes, cooked food, plantable items such as Seeds, and items that do not have a cooked form, such as Honey or Ice.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Victorian Salt Box skin was introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
  • The Loyal Salt Box Shaker skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from April 1, 2020 to April 9, 2020. As of April 1, 2021, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Briny Salt Box skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from May 5, 2021 to May 19, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Woven - Elegant
Victorian Collection
Victorian Salt Box
Stylish and practical food storage.


Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Charming Salt Tin
A sweet design for salty storage.


Loyal
Nautical Collection
Briny Salt Box
This shell encrusted container utilizes sea salt as a natural preservative.
Loyal
Fool's Collection
Salt Box Shaker
Why not shake things up a bit?

Trivia

  • The Salt Box was introduced in the Salty Dog update.
  • Ironically, Jerky cannot be stored in a Salt Box, despite salt being used to further preserve jerky in real life.

Assets

  • Charming Salt Build
  • Charming Salt Build Open
  • Charming Salt Tin Burnt

Gallery

  • Unused texture for a burnt Salt Box.

Contents receive 25% spoilage rate.

"saltbox"
“Just the cure for spoiling food!”
–Wilson
“It'll keep my stuff from rotting, for a little while.”
–Willow
“Put food inside!”
–Wolfgang
“It'll only prolong the inevitable.”
–Wendy
“ARCHAIC FOOD STORAGE”
–WX-78
“This should help prevent food spoilage.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like an icebox, but salt!”
–Woodie
“This will extend the life of our supplies somewhat.”
–Maxwell
“A fine place tö störe meats!”
–Wigfrid
“Makes our food last longer.”
–Webber
“Just the thing for preserving ingredients.”
–Warly
“Salty Food Holder”
–Wormwood
“This'll keep things fresher longer!”
–Winona
“You needn't worry about protecting your food from me.”
–Wortox
“Good place for hiding tasty things.”
–Wurt
“Salt is great for preserving your supplies.”
–Walter
“Some good old-fashioned food storage.”
–Wanda
The Salt Box is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Structures Filter, Storage Solutions Filter and Cooking Filter, requiring ten Salt Crystals, a Blue Gem and a Cut Stone to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Similar to the Ice Box, the Salt Box can be used to store and preserve up to 9 stacks of Food Items. The Salt Box slows the spoilage of food by four times, which is twice the efficiency of an ice box. However, it cannot contain Crock Pot dishes, cooked food, plantable items such as Seeds, and items that do not have a cooked form, such as Honey or Ice.

Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Elegant Victorian Salt Box skin was introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
The Loyal Salt Box Shaker skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from April 1, 2020 to April 9, 2020. As of April 1, 2021, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Briny Salt Box skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from May 5, 2021 to May 19, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hộp Muối là một Kiến Trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Cấu trúc, Bộ lọc Giải pháp Lưu trữ và Bộ lọc Nấu ăn, yêu cầu mười Tinh thể Muối, Đá quý Xanh và Đá Cắt để chế tạo và Máy Giả kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Salt Box

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Object Infobox |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|24|Hammer}} |image = Salt Box Build.png |icon=Salt Box.png |description = Salty storage for your foodstuffs. |ingredient1 = Salt Crystals |multiplier1 = 10 |ingredient2 = Blue Gem |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Cut Stone |multiplier3 = 1 |filter = {{Pic|32|Structures Filter}} {{Pic|32|Storage Solutions Filter}} {{Pic|32|Cooking Filter}} |tier = 2 |perk = Contents receive 25% spoilage rate. |spawnCode = "saltbox"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Just the cure for spoiling food! |willow = It'll keep my stuff from rotting, for a little while. |wolfgang = Put food inside! |wendy = It'll only prolong the inevitable. |wx78 = ARCHAIC FOOD STORAGE |wickerbottom = This should help prevent food spoilage. |woodie = It's like an icebox, but salt! |maxwell = This will extend the life of our supplies somewhat. |wigfrid = A fine place tö störe meats! |webber = Makes our food last longer. |winona = This'll keep things fresher longer! |warly = Just the thing for preserving ingredients. |wortox = You needn't worry about protecting your food from me. |wormwood = Salty Food Holder |wurt = Good place for hiding tasty things. |walter = Salt is great for preserving your supplies. |wanda = Some good old-fashioned food storage. |choose = warly}} The '''Salt Box''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is found in the [[Structures Filter]], [[Storage Solutions Filter]] and [[Cooking Filter]], requiring ten [[Salt Crystals]], a [[Blue Gem]] and a [[Cut Stone]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Similar to the [[Ice Box]], the Salt Box can be used to store and preserve up to 9 stacks of [[Food]] [[Item]]s. The Salt Box slows the spoilage of food by four times, which is twice the efficiency of an ice box. However, it cannot contain [[Crock Pot]] dishes, cooked food, plantable items such as [[Seeds]], and items that do not have a cooked form, such as [[Honey]] or [[Ice]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Storage_Solutions_Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Victorian Salt Box''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Beefalo]] event in 2021. * The '''Loyal Salt Box Shaker''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from April 1, 2020 to April 9, 2020. As of April 1, 2021, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Loyal Briny Salt Box''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from May 5, 2021 to May 19, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
